description: As an administrator (username: admin, password: admin), post an announcement in the "HIST 201: World History" (HIST201) course site in Sakai at http://localhost:8080/portal. Navigate to the HIST201 course site, open the Announcements tool, and create a new announcement with the following details: Title: "Midterm Exam Study Guide and Review Session", Body: "Dear Students, The midterm exam will cover Chapters 1-8 of our textbook 'A History of World Societies' by McKay et al. The exam format includes: 50 multiple choice questions (50%), 2 short answer questions (25%), and 1 essay question (25%). Key topics to review: Ancient Mesopotamian civilizations, Egyptian dynasties, Greek city-states and democracy, Roman Republic and Empire, Han Dynasty China, Indian Maurya and Gupta empires, Rise of Islam, and Medieval European feudalism. A review session will be held this Friday from 3:00-5:00 PM in Room 204 of the History Building. Please bring your textbook and lecture notes. Office hours this week are extended to Tuesday and Thursday 2:00-4:00 PM. Best regards, Professor Anderson". The announcement should be publicly available to all site members.

metadata.announcement_title: Midterm Exam Study Guide and Review Session
